methodology: Refactored to Empowered-style OKRs with a small set of company objectives, linked source objectives, explicit ownership, and measurable key results.
okrDesignPrinciples: Objectives describe customer and business outcomes, not feature delivery.
Key results measure meaningful movement on customer or business KPIs.
Every key result names executing and supporting teams so accountability is explicit.

companyObjectives.title: 2026-Q1 Stabilize creator foundations after monetization expansion
companyObjectives.statement: Earlier quarter objective retained as historical context.

objectives.title: 2026-Q1 Creator foundations archived goal
objectives.objective: Stabilize publishing, payout, and policy flows after creator monetization expansion.

keyResults.statement: Improve creator confidence in payout timing.

executingTeams.intent: Improve monetization visibility and payout explanation.
